corrective_directives: Rewrite visual_direction.kling_prompt to open with an extreme close-up of something ordinary made unsettling — a number on a screen, a hand, a phone notification.
Add a named UK regulatory body or specific percentage/figure with source in THE MECHANISM section. E.g. 'FCA data shows X% of Y in 2024'.
Rewrite THE MOVE so 'none_growth_mode' is introduced as the direct answer to the vulnerability just exposed. The viewer should feel the affiliate is obvious, not pitched.

visual_identity_precondition.failure: Visual prompt is generic — no emotional priming. Add cold, high-contrast, close-up framing that creates unease before the mechanism is named.
visual_identity_precondition.directive: Rewrite visual_direction.kling_prompt to open with an extreme close-up of something ordinary made unsettling — a number on a screen, a hand, a phone notification.

mechanism_specificity.failure: Mechanism lacks a named UK source or specific verifiable claim. Viewers share specifics, not descriptions.
mechanism_specificity.directive: Add a named UK regulatory body or specific percentage/figure with source in THE MECHANISM section. E.g. 'FCA data shows X% of Y in 2024'.

emotional_arc_to_cta.failure: CTA is absent or too short to resolve the tension the intrusion created.
emotional_arc_to_cta.directive: The MOVE section must name the action, make it feel urgent (time-bounded or quantity-bounded), and connect explicitly to the mechanism just named. Don't explain — instruct.

affiliate_as_conclusion.failure: Affiliate 'none_growth_mode' not mentioned in THE MOVE — affiliate will feel like an interruption, not a conclusion.
affiliate_as_conclusion.directive: Rewrite THE MOVE so 'none_growth_mode' is introduced as the direct answer to the vulnerability just exposed. The viewer should feel the affiliate is obvious, not pitched.
